Package de.uka.ilkd.key.rule

Class AbstractBlockContractRule

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.AbstractAuxiliaryContractRule
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.AbstractBlockContractRule
All Implemented Interfaces:
BuiltInRule, Rule, HasOrigin, Named, Rule, RuleExecutor<Goal>
Direct Known Subclasses:
BlockContractExternalRule, BlockContractInternalRule
public abstract class AbstractBlockContractRule extends AbstractAuxiliaryContractRule

Rule for the application of BlockContracts.

See Also:

    • AbstractBlockContractRule

      public AbstractBlockContractRule()

  • Method Details

    • getApplicableContracts

      public static @Nullable ImmutableSet<BlockContract> getApplicableContracts(AbstractAuxiliaryContractRule.Instantiation instantiation, Goal goal, Services services)
      Parameters:
      instantiation - an instantiation.
      goal - the current goal.
      services - services.
      Returns:
      all applicable block contracts for the instantiation.

    • getApplicableContracts

      public static @Nullable ImmutableSet<BlockContract> getApplicableContracts(SpecificationRepository specifications, JavaStatement statement, JModality.JavaModalityKind modalityKind, Goal goal)
      Parameters:
      specifications - a specification repository.
      statement - a block.
      modalityKind - the current goal's modality.
      goal - the current goal.
      Returns:
      all applicable block contracts for the block from the repository.

    • filterAppliedContracts

      protected static ImmutableSet<BlockContract> filterAppliedContracts(ImmutableSet<BlockContract> collectedContracts, Goal goal)
      Parameters:
      collectedContracts - a set of block contracts.
      goal - the current goal.
      Returns:
      the set with all non-applicable contracts filtered out.

    • contractApplied

      protected static boolean contractApplied(BlockContract contract, Goal goal)
      Parameters:
      contract - a block contract.
      goal - the current goal.
      Returns:
      true if the contract has already been applied.

    • getAppliedProofObligation

      protected static @Nullable ProofOblInput getAppliedProofObligation(BlockContract contract, Goal goal)

    • createAndRegisterAnonymisationVariables

      protected static Map<LocationVariable,Function> createAndRegisterAnonymisationVariables(Iterable<LocationVariable> variables, BlockContract contract, TermServices services)
      Parameters:
      variables - variables.
      contract - a block contract.
      services - services.
      Returns:
      a map from every variable that is changed in the block to its anonymization constant.

    • isApplicable

      public boolean isApplicable(Goal goal, PosInOccurrence occurrence)
      Description copied from interface: BuiltInRule
      Returning true iff a rule is applicable at the given position. This does not necessarily mean that a rule application will change the goal (this decision is made due to performance reasons)

    • instantiate

      public AbstractAuxiliaryContractRule.Instantiation instantiate(JTerm formula, Goal goal)
      Parameters:
      formula - the formula on which the rule is to be applied.
      goal - the current goal.
      Returns:
      a new instantiation.
